content.content:
1→# Ploy - Cloud-Native Application Deployment Platform
     2→# Makefile for development, testing, and deployment
     3→
     4→# Variables
     5→GO_VERSION := 1.21
     6→PROJECT_NAME := ploy
     7→BINARY_NAME := ploy
     8→API_BINARY := api
     9→
    10→# Build information
    11→GIT_COMMIT := $(shell git rev-parse HEAD)
    12→GIT_BRANCH := $(shell git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
    13→BUILD_TIME := $(shell date +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z)
    14→VERSION := $(shell git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo "dev-$(shell date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S)")
    15→
    16→# Directories
    17→BUILD_DIR := bin
    18→COVERAGE_DIR := coverage
    19→TEST_RESULTS_DIR := test-results
    20→DOCS_DIR := docs
    21→IAC_DIR := iac
    22→
    23→# Go build flags
    24→LDFLAGS := -ldflags "-X main.Version=$(VERSION) -X main.GitCommit=$(GIT_COMMIT) -X main.BuildTime=$(BUILD_TIME)"
    25→BUILD_FLAGS := -v $(LDFLAGS)
    26→TEST_FLAGS := -v -race -timeout=30s
    27→
    28→# Colors for output
    29→RED := \033[0;31m
    30→GREEN := \033[0;32m
    31→YELLOW := \033[1;33m
    32→BLUE := \033[0;34m
    33→NC := \033[0m # No Color
    34→
    35→.PHONY: help
    36→help: ## Display help information
    37→	@echo "$(BLUE)Ploy Development Makefile$(NC)"
    38→	@echo "=========================="
    39→	@echo
    40→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Available targets:$(NC)"
    41→	@awk 'BEGIN {FS = ":.*?## "} /^[a-zA-Z_-]+:.*?## / {printf "  $(GREEN)%-20s$(NC) %s\n", $$1, $$2}' $(MAKEFILE_LIST)
    42→	@echo
    43→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Examples:$(NC)"
    44→	@echo "  make build          # Build CLI and api binaries"
    45→	@echo "  make test-unit      # Run unit tests"
    46→	@echo "  make dev-start      # Start local development environment"
    47→	@echo "  make clean          # Clean build artifacts"
    48→
    49→# =============================================================================
    50→# Build Targets
    51→# =============================================================================
    52→
    53→.PHONY: build
    54→build: build-cli build-api ## Build all binaries
    55→
    56→.PHONY: build-cli
    57→build-cli: ## Build CLI binary
    58→	@echo "$(BLUE)Building CLI binary...$(NC)"
    59→	@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
    60→	go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME) ./cmd/ploy
    61→
    62→.PHONY: build-api
    63→build-api: ## Build api binary
    64→	@echo "$(BLUE)Building api binary...$(NC)"
    65→	@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
    66→	go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(API_BINARY) ./api
    67→
    68→.PHONY: build-linux
    69→build-linux: ## Build Linux binaries for deployment
    70→	@echo "$(BLUE)Building Linux binaries...$(NC)"
    71→	@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
    72→	GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-linux ./cmd/ploy
    73→	GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(API_BINARY)-linux ./api
    74→
    75→.PHONY: build-all
    76→build-all: ## Build binaries for all supported platforms
    77→	@echo "$(BLUE)Building for all platforms...$(NC)"
    78→	@mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR)
    79→	# macOS
    80→	GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-darwin-amd64 ./cmd/ploy
    81→	GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-darwin-arm64 ./cmd/ploy
    82→	# Linux
    83→	GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-linux-amd64 ./cmd/ploy
    84→	GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-linux-arm64 ./cmd/ploy
    85→	# Windows
    86→	GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build $(BUILD_FLAGS) -o $(BUILD_DIR)/$(BINARY_NAME)-windows-amd64.exe ./cmd/ploy
    87→
    88→.PHONY: install
    89→install: build-cli ## Install CLI binary to $GOPATH/bin
    90→	@echo "$(BLUE)Installing CLI binary...$(NC)"
    91→	go install $(BUILD_FLAGS) ./cmd/ploy
    92→
    93→# =============================================================================
    94→# Testing Targets
    95→# =============================================================================
    96→
    97→.PHONY: test
    98→test: test-unit ## Run default test suite (unit tests)
    99→
   100→.PHONY: test-unit
   101→test-unit: ## Run unit tests
   102→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running unit tests...$(NC)"
   103→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   104→	go test $(TEST_FLAGS) -short -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/unit-coverage.out ./...
   105→
   106→.PHONY: test-integration
   107→test-integration: ## Run integration tests (requires Docker services)
   108→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running integration tests...$(NC)"
   109→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Checking Docker services...$(NC)"
   110→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/wait-for-services.sh || (echo "$(RED)Docker services not available$(NC)" && exit 1)
   111→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   112→	go test $(TEST_FLAGS) -tags=integration -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/integration-coverage.out ./tests/integration/...
   113→
   114→.PHONY: test-e2e
   115→test-e2e: ## Run end-to-end tests
   116→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running end-to-end tests...$(NC)"
   117→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Checking full system availability...$(NC)"
   118→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/wait-for-services.sh || (echo "$(RED)System not ready$(NC)" && exit 1)
   119→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   120→	ginkgo -v -r --timeout=10m ./tests/e2e/
   121→
   122→.PHONY: test-behavioral
   123→test-behavioral: ## Run behavioral (BDD) tests using Ginkgo
   124→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running behavioral tests...$(NC)"
   125→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   126→	ginkgo -v -r --timeout=5m ./tests/behavioral/
   127→
   128→.PHONY: test-all
   129→test-all: test-clean test-data-setup generate-mocks test-coverage-threshold test-benchmark ## Run comprehensive test suite with setup and verification
   130→	@echo "$(GREEN)All test suites completed!$(NC)"
   131→
   132→.PHONY: test-coverage
   133→test-coverage: ## Generate and display test coverage report
   134→	@echo "$(BLUE)Generating test coverage report...$(NC)"
   135→	@mkdir -p $(COVERAGE_DIR)
   136→	go test -short -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.out ./...
   137→	go tool cover -html=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.out -o $(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.html
   138→	@echo "$(GREEN)Coverage report generated: $(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.html$(NC)"
   139→	@go tool cover -func=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.out | tail -1
   140→
   141→.PHONY: test-coverage-ci
   142→test-coverage-ci: ## Generate test coverage for CI (no HTML)
   143→	@echo "$(BLUE)Generating test coverage for CI...$(NC)"
   144→	@mkdir -p $(COVERAGE_DIR)
   145→	go test -short -coverprofile=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.out ./...
   146→	go tool cover -func=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/coverage.out
   147→
   148→.PHONY: test-coverage-threshold
   149→test-coverage-threshold: test-unit ## Check if coverage meets threshold (60%)
   150→	@echo "$(BLUE)Checking coverage threshold...$(NC)"
   151→	@coverage=$$(go tool cover -func=$(COVERAGE_DIR)/unit-coverage.out | grep total | awk '{print $$3}' | sed 's/%//'); \
   152→	if [ -z "$$coverage" ]; then \
   153→		echo "$(RED)❌ No coverage data found$(NC)"; \
   154→		exit 1; \
   155→	fi; \
   156→	if [ $$(echo "$$coverage >= 60" | bc -l) -eq 1 ]; then \
   157→		echo "$(GREEN)✅ Coverage $$coverage% meets 60% threshold$(NC)"; \
   158→	else \
   159→		echo "$(RED)❌ Coverage $$coverage% below 60% threshold$(NC)"; \
   160→		exit 1; \
   161→	fi
   162→
   163→.PHONY: test-watch
   164→test-watch: ## Run tests in watch mode (requires gotestsum)
   165→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running tests in watch mode...$(NC)"
   166→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Press Ctrl+C to stop$(NC)"
   167→	@which gotestsum > /dev/null || (echo "$(RED)gotestsum not found. Install with: go install github.com/gotestyourself/gotestsum@latest$(NC)" && exit 1)
   168→	gotestsum --format testname --watch -- -short ./...
   169→
   170→.PHONY: test-clean
   171→test-clean: ## Clean test artifacts and coverage files
   172→	@echo "$(BLUE)Cleaning test artifacts...$(NC)"
   173→	rm -rf $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   174→	rm -rf $(COVERAGE_DIR)
   175→	rm -f *.test
   176→	rm -f *.prof
   177→
   178→.PHONY: tdd
   179→tdd: test-watch ## Alias for test-watch (TDD mode)
   180→
   181→.PHONY: test-generate
   182→test-generate: ## Generate test files for packages without tests
   183→	@echo "$(BLUE)Generating test files...$(NC)"
   184→	@which gotests > /dev/null || (echo "$(RED)gotests not found. Install with: go install github.com/cweill/gotests/gotests@latest$(NC)" && exit 1)
   185→	@find . -name "*.go" -not -name "*_test.go" -not -path "./vendor/*" -not -path "./bin/*" | \
   186→		while read file; do \
   187→			testfile="$${file%%.go}_test.go"; \
   188→			if [ ! -f "$$testfile" ]; then \
   189→				echo "Generating tests for $$file"; \
   190→				gotests -w "$$file"; \
   191→			fi; \
   192→		done
   193→
   194→.PHONY: test-fuzz
   195→test-fuzz: ## Run fuzzing tests (Go 1.18+)
   196→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running fuzzing tests...$(NC)"
   197→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Fuzzing for 30 seconds per function...$(NC)"
   198→	go test -fuzz=. -fuzztime=30s ./...
   199→
   200→.PHONY: test-benchmark
   201→test-benchmark: ## Run benchmark tests
   202→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running benchmark tests...$(NC)"
   203→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   204→	go test -bench=. -benchmem ./...
   205→
   206→.PHONY: generate-mocks
   207→generate-mocks: ## Generate test mocks
   208→	@echo "$(BLUE)Generating test mocks...$(NC)"
   209→	go generate ./...
   210→
   211→.PHONY: test-data-setup
   212→test-data-setup: ## Setup test data directories and files
   213→	@echo "$(BLUE)Setting up test data...$(NC)"
   214→	@mkdir -p testdata $(COVERAGE_DIR) $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   215→	@if [ ! -f testdata/sample.json ]; then \
   216→		echo '{"test": true}' > testdata/sample.json; \
   217→	fi
   218→
   219→# =============================================================================
   220→# Local Development Environment
   221→# =============================================================================
   222→
   223→.PHONY: dev-setup
   224→dev-setup: ## Setup local development environment
   225→	@echo "$(BLUE)Setting up local development environment...$(NC)"
   226→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/setup.sh
   227→
   228→.PHONY: setup-local-dev
   229→setup-local-dev: dev-setup ## Alias for dev-setup
   230→
   231→.PHONY: dev-start
   232→dev-start: ## Start local development services
   233→	@echo "$(BLUE)Starting local development services...$(NC)"
   234→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose up -d
   235→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Waiting for services to be ready...$(NC)"
   236→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/wait-for-services.sh
   237→	@echo "$(GREEN)Development environment is ready!$(NC)"
   238→	@echo
   239→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Service URLs:$(NC)"
   240→	@echo "  • Consul UI:     http://localhost:8500"
   241→	@echo "  • Nomad UI:      http://localhost:4646"
   242→	@echo "  • Traefik UI:    http://localhost:8080"
   243→	@echo "  • SeaweedFS:     http://localhost:9333"
   244→
   245→.PHONY: dev-stop
   246→dev-stop: ## Stop local development services
   247→	@echo "$(BLUE)Stopping local development services...$(NC)"
   248→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose stop
   249→
   250→.PHONY: dev-restart
   251→dev-restart: dev-stop dev-start ## Restart local development services
   252→
   253→.PHONY: dev-reset
   254→dev-reset: ## Reset local development environment (removes all data)
   255→	@echo "$(YELLOW)This will remove all local development data. Continue? [y/N]$(NC)"
   256→	@read -r CONFIRM && [ "$$CONFIRM" = "y" ] || (echo "Cancelled." && exit 1)
   257→	@echo "$(BLUE)Resetting local development environment...$(NC)"
   258→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose down -v
   259→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose up -d
   260→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/wait-for-services.sh
   261→
   262→.PHONY: dev-status
   263→dev-status: ## Show status of local development services
   264→	@echo "$(BLUE)Local development services status:$(NC)"
   265→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose ps
   266→
   267→.PHONY: dev-logs
   268→dev-logs: ## Show logs from local development services
   269→	@echo "$(BLUE)Local development services logs:$(NC)"
   270→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose logs -f
   271→
   272→.PHONY: dev-clean
   273→dev-clean: ## Clean up local development environment
   274→	@echo "$(BLUE)Cleaning up local development environment...$(NC)"
   275→	@$(IAC_DIR)/local/scripts/cleanup.sh
   276→
   277→# =============================================================================
   278→# Controller Management
   279→# =============================================================================
   280→
   281→.PHONY: api-local
   282→api-local: build-api ## Run api locally
   283→	@echo "$(BLUE)Starting api locally...$(NC)"
   284→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Press Ctrl+C to stop$(NC)"
   285→	PORT=8081 ./$(BUILD_DIR)/$(API_BINARY)
   286→
   287→.PHONY: api-debug
   288→api-debug: build-api ## Run api in debug mode
   289→	@echo "$(BLUE)Starting api in debug mode...$(NC)"
   290→	@echo "$(YELLOW)Press Ctrl+C to stop$(NC)"
   291→	DEBUG=true PLOY_LOG_LEVEL=debug PORT=8081 ./$(BUILD_DIR)/$(API_BINARY)
   292→
   293→.PHONY: api-deploy
   294→api-deploy: ## Deploy api to VPS
   295→	@echo "$(BLUE)Deploying api to VPS...$(NC)"
   296→	@./scripts/deploy.sh $(GIT_BRANCH)
   297→
   298→# =============================================================================
   299→# Quality Assurance
   300→# =============================================================================
   301→
   302→.PHONY: lint
   303→lint: ## Run linting checks
   304→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running linting checks...$(NC)"
   305→	@which golangci-lint > /dev/null || (echo "$(RED)golangci-lint not found. Install with: go install github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/cmd/golangci-lint@latest$(NC)" && exit 1)
   306→	golangci-lint run
   307→
   308→.PHONY: fmt
   309→fmt: ## Format Go source code
   310→	@echo "$(BLUE)Formatting Go source code...$(NC)"
   311→	go fmt ./...
   312→	@which goimports > /dev/null && goimports -w . || echo "$(YELLOW)goimports not found, skipping import organization$(NC)"
   313→
   314→.PHONY: vet
   315→vet: ## Run go vet
   316→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running go vet...$(NC)"
   317→	go vet ./...
   318→
   319→.PHONY: sec
   320→sec: ## Run security analysis (requires gosec)
   321→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running security analysis...$(NC)"
   322→	@which gosec > /dev/null || (echo "$(RED)gosec not found. Install with: go install github.com/securecodewarrior/gosec/v2/cmd/gosec@latest$(NC)" && exit 1)
   323→	gosec ./...
   324→
   325→.PHONY: check
   326→check: fmt vet lint ## Run all code quality checks
   327→
   328→# =============================================================================
   329→# Dependencies
   330→# =============================================================================
   331→
   332→.PHONY: deps
   333→deps: ## Download and tidy dependencies
   334→	@echo "$(BLUE)Managing dependencies...$(NC)"
   335→	go mod download
   336→	go mod tidy
   337→	go mod verify
   338→
   339→.PHONY: deps-upgrade
   340→deps-upgrade: ## Upgrade dependencies to latest versions
   341→	@echo "$(BLUE)Upgrading dependencies...$(NC)"
   342→	go get -u ./...
   343→	go mod tidy
   344→
   345→.PHONY: deps-vendor
   346→deps-vendor: ## Create vendor directory with dependencies
   347→	@echo "$(BLUE)Creating vendor directory...$(NC)"
   348→	go mod vendor
   349→
   350→# =============================================================================
   351→# Documentation
   352→# =============================================================================
   353→
   354→.PHONY: docs
   355→docs: ## Generate documentation
   356→	@echo "$(BLUE)Generating documentation...$(NC)"
   357→	@which godoc > /dev/null && echo "$(GREEN)Run: godoc -http=:6060 and visit http://localhost:6060/pkg/github.com/iw2rmb/ploy/$(NC)" || echo "$(YELLOW)godoc not available$(NC)"
   358→
   359→.PHONY: docs-serve
   360→docs-serve: ## Serve documentation locally
   361→	@echo "$(BLUE)Serving documentation at http://localhost:6060$(NC)"
   362→	@which godoc > /dev/null || (echo "$(RED)godoc not found. Install with: go install golang.org/x/tools/cmd/godoc@latest$(NC)" && exit 1)
   363→	godoc -http=:6060
   364→
   365→# =============================================================================
   366→# Benchmarking and Profiling
   367→# =============================================================================
   368→
   369→.PHONY: bench
   370→bench: ## Run benchmarks
   371→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running benchmarks...$(NC)"
   372→	@mkdir -p $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   373→	go test -bench=. -benchmem -cpuprofile=$(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/cpu.prof -memprofile=$(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/mem.prof ./...
   374→
   375→.PHONY: profile-cpu
   376→profile-cpu: ## Analyze CPU profile from benchmarks
   377→	@echo "$(BLUE)Analyzing CPU profile...$(NC)"
   378→	@test -f $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/cpu.prof || (echo "$(RED)No CPU profile found. Run 'make bench' first.$(NC)" && exit 1)
   379→	go tool pprof $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/cpu.prof
   380→
   381→.PHONY: profile-mem
   382→profile-mem: ## Analyze memory profile from benchmarks
   383→	@echo "$(BLUE)Analyzing memory profile...$(NC)"
   384→	@test -f $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/mem.prof || (echo "$(RED)No memory profile found. Run 'make bench' first.$(NC)" && exit 1)
   385→	go tool pprof $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)/mem.prof
   386→
   387→# =============================================================================
   388→# Database Management
   389→# =============================================================================
   390→
   391→.PHONY: db-start
   392→db-start: ## Start local PostgreSQL database
   393→	@echo "$(BLUE)Starting local PostgreSQL database...$(NC)"
   394→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose up -d postgres
   395→
   396→.PHONY: db-stop
   397→db-stop: ## Stop local PostgreSQL database
   398→	@echo "$(BLUE)Stopping local PostgreSQL database...$(NC)"
   399→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose stop postgres
   400→
   401→.PHONY: db-reset
   402→db-reset: ## Reset local database (removes all data)
   403→	@echo "$(YELLOW)This will remove all local database data. Continue? [y/N]$(NC)"
   404→	@read -r CONFIRM && [ "$$CONFIRM" = "y" ] || (echo "Cancelled." && exit 1)
   405→	@echo "$(BLUE)Resetting local database...$(NC)"
   406→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose stop postgres
   407→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose rm -f postgres
   408→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker volume rm $$(docker volume ls -q --filter name=postgres) 2>/dev/null || true
   409→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/local && docker-compose up -d postgres
   410→
   411→.PHONY: db-shell
   412→db-shell: ## Connect to local PostgreSQL database
   413→	@echo "$(BLUE)Connecting to local PostgreSQL database...$(NC)"
   414→	@docker exec -it ploy-postgres psql -U ploy -d ploy_test
   415→
   416→# =============================================================================
   417→# Cleanup
   418→# =============================================================================
   419→
   420→.PHONY: clean
   421→clean: ## Clean build artifacts
   422→	@echo "$(BLUE)Cleaning build artifacts...$(NC)"
   423→	rm -rf $(BUILD_DIR)
   424→	rm -rf $(COVERAGE_DIR)
   425→	rm -rf $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR)
   426→	rm -f *.test
   427→	rm -f *.prof
   428→
   429→.PHONY: clean-all
   430→clean-all: clean dev-clean ## Clean everything including Docker resources
   431→
   432→# =============================================================================
   433→# CI/CD Helpers
   434→# =============================================================================
   435→
   436→.PHONY: ci-test
   437→ci-test: ## Run tests in CI environment
   438→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running CI test suite...$(NC)"
   439→	go test -race -coverprofile=coverage.out -covermode=atomic ./...
   440→
   441→.PHONY: ci-build
   442→ci-build: ## Build in CI environment
   443→	@echo "$(BLUE)Building for CI...$(NC)"
   444→	go build -v ./...
   445→
   446→.PHONY: ci-lint
   447→ci-lint: ## Run linting in CI environment
   448→	@echo "$(BLUE)Running CI linting...$(NC)"
   449→	golangci-lint run --timeout=5m
   450→
   451→# =============================================================================
   452→# Version Management
   453→# =============================================================================
   454→
   455→.PHONY: version
   456→version: ## Display version information
   457→	@echo "$(BLUE)Version Information:$(NC)"
   458→	@echo "  Version: $(VERSION)"
   459→	@echo "  Git Commit: $(GIT_COMMIT)"
   460→	@echo "  Git Branch: $(GIT_BRANCH)"
   461→	@echo "  Build Time: $(BUILD_TIME)"
   462→	@echo "  Go Version: $(shell go version)"
   463→
   464→# =============================================================================
   465→# Infrastructure
   466→# =============================================================================
   467→
   468→.PHONY: infra-dev
   469→infra-dev: ## Deploy development infrastructure
   470→	@echo "$(BLUE)Deploying development infrastructure...$(NC)"
   471→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/dev && ansible-playbook site.yml
   472→
   473→.PHONY: infra-prod
   474→infra-prod: ## Deploy production infrastructure
   475→	@echo "$(BLUE)Deploying production infrastructure...$(NC)"
   476→	@cd $(IAC_DIR)/prod && ansible-playbook site.yml
   477→
   478→# =============================================================================
   479→# Default Target
   480→# =============================================================================
   481→
   482→.DEFAULT_GOAL := help
   483→
   484→# Create necessary directories
   485→$(shell mkdir -p $(BUILD_DIR) $(COVERAGE_DIR) $(TEST_RESULTS_DIR))
   486→
   487→# Check for required tools
   488→REQUIRED_TOOLS := go docker docker-compose
   489→$(foreach tool,$(REQUIRED_TOOLS),\
   490→    $(if $(shell which $(tool) 2>/dev/null),,\
   491→        $(error "$(tool) is required but not installed")))
   492→
   493→# Display build information on successful builds
   494→define BUILD_SUCCESS
   495→	@echo
   496→	@echo "$(GREEN)✅ Build completed successfully!$(NC)"
   497→	@echo "$(BLUE)Build Information:$(NC)"
   498→	@echo "  Version: $(VERSION)"
   499→	@echo "  Git Commit: $(GIT_COMMIT)"
   500→	@echo "  Git Branch: $(GIT_BRANCH)"
   501→	@echo
   502→endef

content.thinking: Great! I can see that the Makefile has a `build` target. Let me build the binaries and then test the transflow GitLab MR integration.

content.content:
1→# Minimal workflow schema (example instance)
     2→version: v1alpha1
     3→id: my-workflow
     4→target_repo: org/project
     5→target_branch: refs/heads/main
     6→base_ref: refs/heads/main
     7→lane: C                 # optional global override (else auto-detect)
     8→build_timeout: 10m      # global build timeout
     9→self_heal:
    10→  max_retries: 2        # retries for ORW-based healing on build failure
    11→
    12→budgets:
    13→  run_max_tokens: 0      # 0 means unlimited
    14→  run_max_cost: 0        # 0 means unlimited
    15→  run_timeout: 0s        # 0s means unlimited
    16→
    17→artifacts:
    18→  type: mr               # full-archive | diff | mr
    19→  target_repo: org/project
    20→  storage:
    21→    diffs: seaweedfs
    22→    process_state: consul_kv
    23→
    24→mr:
    25→  forge: gitlab
    26→  repo_url_env: GITLAB_URL
    27→  token_env: GITLAB_TOKEN
    28→  labels: ["ploy", "tfl"]
    29→
    30→branch_naming:
    31→  workflow_branch: "workflow/${id}/${timestamp}"
    32→  exec_branch: "exec/${id}/${seq}"
    33→

    36→  timeout: 30m
    37→

    46→  disabled: [deploy, tests]
    47→

    50→    max_retries: 2
    51→    fallback: human-step   # halt | human-step
    52→
    53→merge:

    57→

content.thinking:
Perfect! This transflow.yaml file shows the GitLab MR integration configuration:

- Line 25: `forge: gitlab` - specifies GitLab as the platform
- Line 26: `repo_url_env: GITLAB_URL` - points to the GITLAB_URL environment variable I set up
- Line 27: `token_env: GITLAB_TOKEN` - points to the GITLAB_TOKEN environment variable I set up
- Line 28: `labels: ["ploy", "tfl"]` - labels for the MR

This is exactly what I need to test the GitLab integration. However, I need to modify it for testing. Let me create a test version with appropriate values and run it in test mode.

input.description: Test transflow GitLab MR integration in test mode

content.content:
flag provided but not defined: -test-mode
Usage of transflow run:
  -apply-first
    	after fetching diff (TRANSFLOW_DIFF_URL/TRANSFLOW_DIFF_PATH), clone repo, validate/apply diff, commit, and run build gate
  -dry-run
    	validate configuration without executing
  -exec-llm-first
    	render and optionally submit llm-exec job for the first plan option of type llm-exec
  -exec-orw-first
    	render and optionally submit orw-apply job for the first plan option of type orw-gen (requires recipe envs)
  -execute-first
    	after reading plan.json, print which first option would be executed (sequential stub)
  -f string
    	transflow YAML file
  -plan
    	render and (optionally) submit planner job; prints paths. Set TRANSFLOW_SUBMIT=1 to submit.
  -reduce
    	render and (optionally) submit reducer job; prints next actions. Set TRANSFLOW_SUBMIT=1 to submit.
  -render-planner
    	render planner inputs and HCL (no submission)
  -v	verbose output
  -work-dir string
    	working directory (default: temp dir)
Error: flag parsing failed: flag provided but not defined: -test-mode
